home.tagline: Clip directly from YouTube videos. Build your own library. Review like Anki — with AI explanations baked in.

auth.signupDescription: Create an account on Mimi and start clipping.
auth.loginDescription: Log in to Mimi and pick up where you left off.
auth.name: Name

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Search your saved clips or filter by tag. Click a clip to loop-play it.
library.emptyDescription: Import a YouTube video and make your first clip.
library.deckDeleteConfirm: Delete this deck? Clips inside will move to Inbox.
library.deckDeleted: Deck deleted, clips kept in Inbox

import.title: Import a YouTube video
import.subtitle: Videos with subtitles work right away. Videos without subtitles import but the clips will have empty transcripts.

review.title: Review
review.doneEmpty: Make a few more clips, or come back tomorrow.
review.writeNoTranslation: AI hasn't generated a Korean translation for this clip yet. Open the clip and click "Regenerate" in the AI tab.
review.scenarioNo: No practice scenario yet. Open the clip → AI tab → Regenerate.
review.scenarioPlaceholder: Type your English response to this situation…

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and password.
settings.name: Name
settings.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation don't match
settings.deleteSubtitle: アカウントと全データを完全に削除します。
settings.deleteWarning: 取り消せません。クリップ・録音・学習記録・アカウントが消去されます。
settings.deletePasswordLabel: 確認のためパスワードを入力
settings.deleteFailed: 削除できませんでした

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Curated video collections for developer English study.
discover.emptyDescription: Fill in the backend's curated-videos.yml to seed the first collection.
discover.noVideosInCollection: No videos in this collection yet.

clipCreate.title: Pick a range → save as clip
clipCreate.subtitle: Click subtitles to jump there, then set Start/End to define the range.
clipCreate.modalSubtitle: Pick a name and tags and it lands in your library.

audioMode.label: Audio mode
audioMode.hint: Video hidden. Focus on the audio + caption — like an Anki audio card.

blind.label: Blind mode
blind.hintHidden: Listen first. Try to shadow without seeing the words.
blind.hintHints: First letters only. Fill in the blanks as you go.

note.title: My note
note.subtitle: Personal memo. Translation, related words, breath markings — whatever helps.

recording.title: Record + A/B compare
recording.subtitle: Loop the original and record yourself. You can play your take back-to-back with the original.
recording.unsupported: This browser does not support recording
recording.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow it in your browser settings.

analysis.title: AI explanation
analysis.pendingAutoRefresh: Analyzing — this view will refresh automatically.
analysis.chunkedHint: English chunks in source order — read top-to-bottom, then say it out loud.
analysis.byoaiHint: Sends the prompt to your ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude/Perplexity. If auto-fill doesn't work, paste with ⌘V once you're there.
analysis.noTranscriptForExternal: No subtitle — can't build an analysis prompt
analysis.prepositionsHint: Why each preposition — the relationship it encodes, not a dictionary gloss.

transcript.emptyNote: This video has no subtitles. You can still pick ranges on the video itself, but clips will have empty transcripts.
transcript.hintInitial: Click a subtitle to start your range. To save a single line, click once → 'Save this clip'.
transcript.hintAfterFirst: Click another subtitle to extend. Single line is fine — just hit 'Save this clip'.

globalError.title: Something went wrong
globalError.fallback: Please try again in a moment.

prepositions.title: Prepositions
prepositions.intro: Build intuition for each preposition — the relationship it encodes — and see the ones you mined from your own clips.
prepositions.minedEmpty: None yet — analyze a few clips and the prepositions you meet will collect here.
prepositions.drillEmpty: No items yet — analyze a few clips first.

chunkShadow.instruction: Say each chunk out loud, then reveal the next.
chunkShadow.needAnalysis: Analyze this clip first to get its chunks.
chunkShadow.doneTitle: You said the whole sentence in chunks 🎉

patterns.title: Patterns
patterns.intro: Drill the sentence frames natives use without thinking. Say each one out loud, every day, until it is automatic.
patterns.caughtUp: ✅ Caught up — nothing due. Try a category below, or come back tomorrow.

practice.title: Practice
practice.intro: Your daily drills — say them out loud until they're automatic. Separate from your video library.
practice.patternsDesc: Sentence frames natives use without thinking — the "as" family, relative clauses, indirect questions, conditionals, and more.
practice.prepositionsDesc: Build a feel for each preposition with animated diagrams, plus the ones mined from your own clips.
practice.collocationsDesc: Word + preposition learned as one chunk — depend on, good at, deploy to. The fastest path to not pausing.
practice.weakDesc: The cards you keep missing — what to focus on. Updates as you drill.
practice.composeDesc: Write your own sentences with a pattern or chunk; AI checks them. Active production, not recall.
practice.gymDesc: Bend one sentence through ~50 grammar moves — master it.

collocations.title: Collocations
collocations.intro: Prepositions you can't reason out — learn the whole "word + preposition" as one chunk and say it until it's automatic.
collocations.caughtUp: ✅ Caught up — nothing due. Try a category below, or come back tomorrow.

weak.title: Weak spots
weak.intro: The drill cards you miss most. They already come back sooner in your daily drill — this is the X-ray.
weak.emptyNoData: No drill data yet — do a daily drill first and your weak spots will show up here.
weak.emptyNoWeak: ✅ No misses yet. Keep drilling — anything you fumble surfaces here.
weak.drillNote: These come back automatically in the daily drill (low box = due soon).

compose.title: Compose
compose.intro: Write your own sentence using the target — AI checks it and suggests a better version. Production, not just recall.
compose.placeholder: Write a sentence using the target…
compose.notConfigured: AI isn't configured — add a GEMINI_API_KEY to the backend to use this.

legal.privacy: プライバシーポリシー
legal.templateNote: This is a template and not legal advice. Review with a professional before commercial launch.

gym.title: Today's sentence
gym.subtitle: Take one base sentence and bend it through ~50 grammar moves until it's automatic.
gym.notConfigured: AI isn't configured (a provider API key is required).
gym.noClipSeeds: No sentences to pull from clips yet. Type one yourself.
